speaker: speaker1
text: What date will our field trip be on ?

speaker: speaker2
text: The science field trip is next Monday at 8 o'clock in the morning . Do you want to make note of that on your calendar ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , I will make note of that .

speaker: speaker2
text: Next Monday is December 2nd . The buses will leave at 8 , but we must begin loading at 7

speaker: speaker1
text: I will be there half an hour early .

speaker: speaker2
text: You might want to tell whoever is picking you up that you will return on December 8th . Do you have a ride ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , someone is picking me up .

speaker: speaker2
text: To get back to campus by 8

speaker: speaker1
text: Not at the moment — maybe later , though .

speaker: speaker2
text: All of the extra information that you need is on the bulletin board in the hallway . See you on Monday !
